ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the program is held */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Dates when the program is held */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week when the program is held */,
  "times" TEXT /* Times when the program is held */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the program */,
  "waitlist_status" INTEGER /* Whether the program has a waitlist */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the program */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., 'sports', 'arts', 'education') */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the program (e.g., 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced') */,
  "program_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being enrolled in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolling */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., 'enrolled', 'waitlisted', 'selected') */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the enrollment (e.g., 'paid', 'pending', 'refund') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'coach', 'parent') */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., 'credit card', 'check') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being waitlisted for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being waitlisted */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position of the user on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selection_lists" (
  "selection_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection list entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being selected for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being selected */,
  "selection_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the selection list */,
  "selection_position" INTEGER /* Position of the user on the selection list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selection_lists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selection_lists_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being held */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session is held */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time when the session is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's attendance (e.g., 'present', 'absent') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES program_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being coached */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user coaching */,
  "coach_role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., 'head coach', 'assistant coach') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
